title: Better Hitreg+
description: Clientside mod that registers hits before the server to make hitreg feel faster, includes various pvp utilities mainly designed for sword
body:
**Join our Community for The most recent updates!**

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Click%20to%20Join-HRPlus%20Community-blue?logo=discord)](https://dsc.gg/hrplus)

betterhitreg+ is a clean PvP utility mod for Fabric 1.21.11 with a custom in-game menu opened by Right Shift. It includes hitreg-focused combat helpers, render toggles, armor glint customization, profile save/load/export, player and game visual controls, and a tabbed UI built for quick access during PvP.

Right-Shift to Open The Menu.
!
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7ff4b0b6073985295aa39ca1e0456481f2e3a00.png)
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
dm discord laughinglethal for any problems or anything related to the mod, or if u tryna give some motivation :)
